sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64199" key="lusi/drws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῡσ-ίδρως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n64199.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">freeing from perspiration</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:1:252" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.252</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
